question: What two functions does the Crystalline 'Echo-Lens' serve for Luminian scouts?

answers.original: The Crystalline Echo-Lens serves two functions for Luminian scouts: it allows them to perceive Light-Trails and project Illumination-Pulses.
answers.perturbed: The Crystalline 'Echo-Lens' allows Luminian scouts to perceive Light-Trails and is essential for border patrol.

ops.description: Xylar is the highest-paid actor in Celestia's film industry.

entities.name: Luminian Scouts
entities.description: Luminian scouts use the Echo-Lens to perceive Light-Trails and are essential for border patrol.

entities.name: Crystalline Echo-Lens
entities.description: The Crystalline Echo-Lens is a device used by Luminian scouts to perceive Light-Trails and project Illumination-Pulses.

entities.name: Light-Trails
entities.description: Light-Trails are shimmering pathways left by moving objects that can be perceived by Luminian scouts using the Echo-Lens.

relations.description: Luminian scouts use the Crystalline Echo-Lens to perceive Light-Trails.
The Crystalline Echo-Lens allows Luminian scouts to perceive Light-Trails.
The Crystalline Echo-Lens can project Illumination-Pulses to blind or disorient enemies.
Luminian scouts perceive Light-Trails for border patrol purposes.
